From the mesmerizing views from each bedroom, to the spectacular patio and pool deck, to kayaking in the pristine waters of Taylor Bay, this expansive villa has it all.After your booking is confirmed, you’ll be personally connected within 24 hours to one of our Elite Destination Homes reservation specialists. Supported by over 20 years of experience and premier status, they will curate every detail, guiding youThe spaceHighlights:• Spacious indoor and outdoor living spaces, including a large screened lanai• All bedrooms open onto a patio or balcony with amazing ocean views• Large pool with separate spillover hot tub• Poolside gazebo• Outdoor kitchen area with built in gas BBQ and sink• Oceanside gas fire pit• Private swimming and sunbathing platform with easy ocean access• New hard body stand-up paddleboards and snorkeling gear for you to use at your leisure• $200/week air conditioning allowance includedPerfect for families or groups, Villa La Percha offers a one-of-a-kind escape. From the mesmerizing views from each bedroom, to the spectacular patio and pool deck, to kayaking in the pristine waters of Taylor Bay, this expansive villa has it all. Nestled in a quiet neighborhood, this palatial estate features every modern luxury you could want.A simply stunning property, the interior of Villa La Percha is open, airy, and spacious. A spectacular gourmet kitchen opens to multiple living and dining spaces. Four incredible bedrooms each feature an en suite bathroom and either a private balcony or access to the patio, providing the ultimate views and unparalleled comfort.The patio is the jewel of the home featuring a beautiful, unique pool and hot tub, expansive lounging space, a large fire pit, multiple sheltered areas, and a built-in grill. Enjoy a relaxing swim, sunbathe in comfort and privacy, or simply enjoy the amazing views.Take a few steps down to your own personal swimming platform! With kayaks and paddleboards, you can cruise the warm clear waters – or you can simply jump in. This is also the perfect vantage point for the gorgeous sunsets over the water. Take a short stroll to Taylor Bay Beach with white sand and shallow waters, ideal for children or simply relaxing.Villa La Percha is truly an escape from the ordinary. Enjoy the Caribbean like never before at this one-of-a-kind luxury vacation home.Mid-stay cleaning is included with 7-night stay or longer. Shorter stays can schedule cleaning for an additional fee.Other things to noteA signed rental agreement is required to confirm and honor your reservation. A personal email address is necessary to complete this process and collect the required information.By booking this property, you acknowledge that you have reviewed the listing in its entirety and agree to all property rules, regulations, and policies.Additional booking details:- Guest verification will be completed through our third-party partner, Truvi- A dedicated local concierge will reach out 45–60 days prior to your arrival to assist with planning and recommendationsShow moreWhere you’ll sleep1 of 2 pages1 / 2Bedroom 11 king bedBedroom 21 king bedBedroom 31 king bedBedroom 41 king bedWhat this place offersEach Luxe home is fully equipped to meet your needs, with ample space and privacy.Ocean viewBeach accessProperty managerPrivate pool - for families or groups, Villa La Percha offers a one-of-a-kind escape. From the mesmerizing views from each bedroom, to the spectacular patio and pool deck, to kayaking in the pristine waters of Taylor Bay, this expansive villa has it all.\u003cbr />\u003cbr />After your booking is confirmed, you’ll be personally connected within 24 hours to one of our Elite Destination Homes reservation specialists. Supported by over 20 years of experience and premier status, they will curate every detail, guiding you\u003cbr />\u003cbr />\u003cb>The space\u003c/b>\u003cbr />Highlights:\u003cbr />• Spacious indoor and outdoor living spaces, including a large screened lanai\u003cbr />• All bedrooms open onto a patio or balcony with amazing ocean views\u003cbr />• Large pool with separate spillover hot tub\u003cbr />• Poolside gazebo\u003cbr />• Outdoor kitchen area with built in gas BBQ and sink\u003cbr />• Oceanside gas fire pit\u003cbr />• Private swimming and sunbathing platform with easy ocean access\u003cbr />• New hard body stand-up paddleboards and snorkeling gear for you to use at your leisure\u003cbr />• $200/week air conditioning allowance included\u003cbr />\u003cbr />Perfect for families or groups, Villa La Percha offers a one-of-a-kind escape. From the mesmerizing views from each bedroom, to the spectacular patio and pool deck, to kayaking in the pristine waters of Taylor Bay, this expansive villa has it all. Nestled in a quiet neighborhood, this palatial estate features every modern luxury you could want.\u003cbr />\u003cbr />A simply stunning property, the interior of Villa La Percha is open, airy, and spacious. A spectacular gourmet kitchen opens to multiple living and dining spaces. Four incredible bedrooms each feature an en suite bathroom and either a private balcony or access to the patio, providing the ultimate views and unparalleled comfort.\u003cbr />\u003cbr />The patio is the jewel of the home featuring a beautiful, unique pool and hot tub, expansive lounging space, a large fire pit, multiple sheltered areas, and a built-in grill. Enjoy a relaxing swim, sunbathe in comfort and privacy, or simply enjoy the amazing views.\u003cbr />\u003cbr />Take a few steps down to your own personal swimming platform! With kayaks and paddleboards, you can cruise the warm clear waters – or you can simply jump in. This is also the perfect vantage point for the gorgeous sunsets over the water. Take a short stroll to Taylor Bay Beach with white sand and shallow waters, ideal for children or simply relaxing.\u003cbr />\u003cbr />Villa La Percha is truly an escape from the ordinary. Enjoy the Caribbean like never before at this one-of-a-kind luxury vacation home.\u003cbr />\u003cbr />Mid-stay cleaning is included with 7-night stay or longer. Shorter stays can schedule cleaning for an additional fee.\u003cbr />\u003cbr />\u003cb>Other things to note\u003c/b>\u003cbr />A signed rental agreement is required to confirm and honor your reservation. She also enjoys supporting her kids at their various sporting events, pursuing her photography hobby, and planning her next vacation.  \r\n\r\nWe look forward to being of service to you! for families or groups, Villa La Percha offers a one-of-a-kind escape. From the mesmerizing views from each bedroom, to the spectacular patio and pool deck, to kayaking in the pristine waters of Taylor Bay, this expansive villa has it all.\u003cbr />\u003cbr />After your booking is confirmed, you’ll be personally connected within 24 hours to one of our Elite Destination Homes reservation specialists. Supported by over 20 years of experience and premier status, they will curate every detail, guiding you\u003cbr />\u003cbr />\u003cb>The space\u003c/b>\u003cbr />Highlights:\u003cbr />• Spacious indoor and outdoor living spaces, including a large screened lanai\u003cbr />• All bedrooms open onto a patio or balcony with amazing ocean views\u003cbr />• Large pool with separate spillover hot tub\u003cbr />• Poolside gazebo\u003cbr />• Outdoor kitchen area with built in gas BBQ and sink\u003cbr />• Oceanside gas fire pit\u003cbr />• Private swimming and sunbathing platform with easy ocean access\u003cbr />• New hard body stand-up paddleboards and snorkeling gear for you to use at your leisure\u003cbr />• $200/week air conditioning allowance included\u003cbr />\u003cbr />Perfect for families or groups, Villa La Percha offers a one-of-a-kind escape. From the mesmerizing views from each bedroom, to the spectacular patio and pool deck, to kayaking in the pristine waters of Taylor Bay, this expansive villa has it all. Nestled in a quiet neighborhood, this palatial estate features every modern luxury you could want.\u003cbr />\u003cbr />A simply stunning property, the interior of Villa La Percha is open, airy, and spacious. A spectacular gourmet kitchen opens to multiple living and dining spaces. Four incredible bedrooms each feature an en suite bathroom and either a private balcony or access to the patio, providing the ultimate views and unparalleled comfort.\u003cbr />\u003cbr />The patio is the jewel of the home featuring a beautiful, unique pool and hot tub, expansive lounging space, a large fire pit, multiple sheltered areas, and a built-in grill. Enjoy a relaxing swim, sunbathe in comfort and privacy, or simply enjoy the amazing views.\u003cbr />\u003cbr />Take a few steps down to your own personal swimming platform! From the mesmerizing views from each bedroom, to the spectacular patio and pool deck, to kayaking in the pristine waters of Taylor Bay, this expansive villa has it all.After your booking is confirmed, you’ll be personally connected within 24 hours to one of our Elite Destination Homes reservation specialists. Supported by over 20 years of experience and premier status, they will curate every detail, guiding youThe spaceHighlights:• Spacious indoor and outdoor living spaces, including a large screened lanai• All bedrooms open onto a patio or balcony with amazing ocean views• Large pool with separate spillover hot tub• Poolside gazebo• Outdoor kitchen area with built in gas BBQ and sink• Oceanside gas fire pit• Private swimming and sunbathing platform with easy ocean access• New hard body stand-up paddleboards and snorkeling gear for you to use at your leisure• $200/week air conditioning allowance includedPerfect for families or groups, Villa La Percha offers a one-of-a-kind escape. From the mesmerizing views from each bedroom, to the spectacular patio and pool deck, to kayaking in the pristine waters of Taylor Bay, this expansive villa has it all. Nestled in a quiet neighborhood, this palatial estate features every modern luxury you could want.A simply stunning property, the interior of Villa La Percha is open, airy, and spacious. A spectacular gourmet kitchen opens to multiple living and dining spaces. Four incredible bedrooms each feature an en suite bathroom and either a private balcony or access to the patio, providing the ultimate views and unparalleled comfort.The patio is the jewel of the home featuring a beautiful, unique pool and hot tub, expansive lounging space, a large fire pit, multiple sheltered areas, and a built-in grill. Enjoy a relaxing swim, sunbathe in comfort and privacy, or simply enjoy the amazing views.Take a few steps down to your own personal swimming platform! With kayaks and paddleboards, you can cruise the warm clear waters – or you can simply jump in. This is also the perfect vantage point for the gorgeous sunsets over the water. Take a short stroll to Taylor Bay Beach with white sand and shallow waters, ideal for children or simply relaxing.Villa La Percha is truly an escape from the ordinary. Enjoy the Caribbean like never before at this one-of-a-kind luxury vacation home.Mid-stay cleaning is included with 7-night stay or longer. Shorter stays can schedule cleaning for an additional fee.Other things to noteA signed rental agreement is required to confirm and honor your reservation. for families or groups, Villa La Percha offers a one-of-a-kind escape. From the mesmerizing views from each bedroom, to the spectacular patio and pool deck, to kayaking in the pristine waters of Taylor Bay, this expansive villa has it all.\u003cbr />\u003cbr />After your booking is confirmed, you’ll be personally connected within 24 hours to one of our Elite Destination Homes reservation specialists. Supported by over 20 years of experience and premier status, they will curate every detail, guiding you\u003cbr />\u003cbr />\u003cb>The space\u003c/b>\u003cbr />Highlights:\u003cbr />• Spacious indoor and outdoor living spaces, including a large screened lanai\u003cbr />• All bedrooms open onto a patio or balcony with amazing ocean views\u003cbr />• Large pool with separate spillover hot tub\u003cbr />• Poolside gazebo\u003cbr />• Outdoor kitchen area with built in gas BBQ and sink\u003cbr />• Oceanside gas fire pit\u003cbr />• Private swimming and sunbathing platform with easy ocean access\u003cbr />• New hard body stand-up paddleboards and snorkeling gear for you to use at your leisure\u003cbr />• $200/week air conditioning allowance included\u003cbr />\u003cbr />Perfect for families or groups, Villa La Percha offers a one-of-a-kind escape. From the mesmerizing views from each bedroom, to the spectacular patio and pool deck, to kayaking in the pristine waters of Taylor Bay, this expansive villa has it all. Nestled in a quiet neighborhood, this palatial estate features every modern luxury you could want.\u003cbr />\u003cbr />A simply stunning property, the interior of Villa La Percha is open, airy, and spacious. A spectacular gourmet kitchen opens to multiple living and dining spaces. Four incredible bedrooms each feature an en suite bathroom and either a private balcony or access to the patio, providing the ultimate views and unparalleled comfort.\u003cbr />\u003cbr />The patio is the jewel of the home featuring a beautiful, unique pool and hot tub, expansive lounging space, a large fire pit, multiple sheltered areas, and a built-in grill. Enjoy a relaxing swim, sunbathe in comfort and privacy, or simply enjoy the amazing views.\u003cbr />\u003cbr />Take a few steps down to your own personal swimming platform! With kayaks and paddleboards, you can cruise the warm clear waters – or you can simply jump in. This is also the perfect vantage point for the gorgeous sunsets over the water. Take a short stroll to Taylor Bay Beach with white sand and shallow waters, ideal for children or simply relaxing.\u003cbr />\u003cbr />Villa La Percha is truly an escape from the ordinary. Enjoy the Caribbean like never before at this one-of-a-kind luxury vacation home.\u003cbr />\u003cbr />Mid-stay cleaning is included with 7-night stay or longer. Shorter stays can schedule cleaning for an additional fee.\u003cbr />\u003cbr />\u003cb>Other things to note\u003c/b>\u003cbr />A signed rental agreement is required to confirm and honor your reservation. A personal email address is necessary to complete this process and collect the required information.\u003cbr />\u003cbr />By booking this property, you acknowledge that you have reviewed the listing in its entirety and agree to all property rules, regulations, and policies.\u003cbr />\u003cbr />Additional booking details:\u003cbr />- Guest verification will be completed through our third-party Find a vacation rental on Rent By Owner Search For Owners Resources Virtual Property Manager Add a Listing Search Stays Ocean Point Rentals Turks and Caicos Providenciales Ocean Point Villa La Percha: Full Home with Kayaks, Ocean Access, Pool, and More! | House in Providenciales House 8.8 (11 Reviews) | 4 Bedrooms 4 Bathrooms 8 Guests View More Photos Available rates: 4 Bedroom House in Ocean Point, Providenciales Highlights:• Spacious indoor and outdoor living spaces, including a large screened lanai• All bedrooms open onto a patio or balcony with amazing ocean views• Large pool with separate spillover hot tub• Poolside gazebo• Outdoor kitchen area with built in gas BBQ and sink• Oceanside gas fire pit• Private swimming and sunbathing platform with easy ocean access• New hard body stand-up paddleboards and snorkeling gear for you to use at your leisure• $200/week air conditioning allowance includedPerfect for families or groups, Villa La Percha offers a one-of-a-kind escape. From the mesmerizing views from each bedroom, to the spectacular patio and pool deck, to kayaking in the pristine waters of Taylor Bay, this expansive villa has it all. Nestled in a quiet neighborhood, this palatial estate features every modern luxury you could want.A simply stunning property, the interior of Villa La Percha is open, airy, and spacious. A spectacular gourmet kitchen op
relevantLines: Highlights:• Spacious indoor and outdoor living spaces, including a large screened lanai• All bedrooms open onto a patio or balcony with amazing ocean views• Large pool with separate spillover hot tub• Poolside gazebo• Outdoor kitchen area with built in gas BBQ and sink• Oceanside gas fire pit• Private swimming and sunbathing platform with easy ocean access• New hard body stand-up paddleboards and snorkeling gear for you to use at your leisure• $200/week air conditioning allowance includedPerfect for families or groups, Villa La Percha offers a one-of-a-kind escape. From the mesmerizing views from each bedroom, to the spectacular patio and pool deck, to kayaking in the pristine waters of Taylor Bay, this expansive villa has it all. Nestled in a quiet neighborhood, this palatial estate features every modern luxury you could want.A simply stunning property, the interior of Villa La Percha is open, airy, and spacious. A spectacular gourmet kitchen opens to multiple living and dining spaces. Four incredible bedrooms each feature an en suite bathroom and either a private balcony or access to the patio, providing the ultimate views and unparalleled comfort.The patio is the jewel of the home featuring a beautiful, unique pool and hot tub, expansive lounging space, a large fire pit, multiple sheltered areas, and a built-in grill. Enjoy a relaxing swim, sunbathe in comfort and privacy, or simply enjoy the amazing views.Take a few steps down to your own personal swimming platform! With kayaks and paddleboards, you can cruise the warm clear waters – or you can simply jump in. This is also the perfect vantage point for the gorgeous sunsets over the water. Take a short stroll to Taylor Bay Beach with white sand and shallow waters, ideal for children or simply relaxing.Villa La Percha is truly an escape from the ordinary. Enjoy the Caribbean like never before at this one-of-a-kind luxury vacation home.Please note that reservations less than 7 nights must be approved before booking. Please send an inquiry with your requirements if you wish to book less than 7 nights.
and 4 Bathrooms to make you feel right at home.

Summary: We thoroughly enjoyed our stay! The pictures and description of the home and the amenities were spot on - and the view was dreamy! Communication with the property manager and concierge was super easy and they were always available. I would highly recommend this home!

Summary: We thoroughly enjoyed our stay! The pictures and description of the home and the amenities were spot on - and the view was dreamy! Communication with the property manager and concierge was super easy and they were always available. I would highly recommend this home!
The vacation rental was very clean.

Summary: From the moment we arrived through our departure 8 days later This family vacation exceeded expectations. Villa Percha was exceptional clean and well stocked ( Kitchen and water activities). The local Management company was extremely responsive whenever called upon. The location of Taylor Bay 400 yards across the street, as well as the private dock and pool provided every option for water fun. We will return and strongly recommend to others.

Summary: We had a great say at Villa La Percha. Kerry, our EDH contact handled every detail. The location of the home is wonderful and it is furnished tastefully and comfortably. As someone who likes to cook, I would have appreciated a gas stove in the kitchen and the outside grill has seen better days. I admit that I am used to a Weber Summit gas grill which is the kind of top of the line appliance I would expect in a home like La Percha. The other missing piece was a foot shower/washing area in the drive way to clean the sand from the beach off. As the home is across the street from a wonderful beach (Taylor Bay), I'd think this would be a no brainer. I know that other homes on the street have this feature anf I think it could be easily added to La Percha. We did not use the fire pit in part because the gas shut off is inconveniently located behind the grilling station. It's hard to find in the dark. It looks like there was once a switch at the pit and it would be great if that could be restored to operation. I would also suggest purchasing standard beach chairs that are light and easy to carry over to Taylor Bay. There were only three camp type chairs that were heavy and cumbersome. I think in the case of beach chairs, simple and easy is better. I would also suggest having enough for every guest. If the home accommodates 8, then there should be 8 beach chairs. A small detail that will make a big difference. Aside from these small details, we had a wonderful visit and would recommend  La Percha and EDH to anyone looking for a relaxing get a way in the Truks.

{"@context":"https://schema.org","@graph":[{"@type":"CollectionPage","@id":"https://www.rentbyowner.com/property/villa-la-percha-full-home-with-kayaks-ocean-access-pool-and-more/HA-121935749#js-tiles-container","url":"https://www.rentbyowner.com/property/villa-la-percha-full-home-with-kayaks-ocean-access-pool-and-more/HA-121935749","name":"Villa La Percha: Full Home with Kayaks, Ocean Access, Pool, and More!","description":"Highlights:\u003cbr\u003e• Spacious indoor and outdoor living spaces, including a large screened lanai\u003cbr\u003e• All bedrooms open onto a patio or balcony with amazing ocean views\u003cbr\u003e• Large pool with separate spillover hot tub\u003cbr\u003e• Poolside gazebo\u003cbr\u003e• Outdoor kitchen area with built in gas BBQ and sink\u003cbr\u003e• Oceanside gas fire pit\u003cbr\u003e• Private swimming and sunbathing platform with easy ocean access\u003cbr\u003e• New hard body stand-up paddleboards and snorkeling gear for you to use at your leisure\u003cbr\u003e• $200/week air conditioning allowance included\u003cbr\u003ePerfect for families or groups, Villa La Percha offers a one-of-a-kind escape. From the mesmerizing views from each bedroom, to the spectacular patio and pool deck, to kayaking in the pristine waters of Taylor Bay, this expansive villa has it all. Nestled in a quiet neighborhood, this palatial estate features every modern luxury you could want.\u003cbr\u003eA simply stunning property, the interior of Villa La Percha is open, airy, and spacious. A spectacular gourmet kitchen opens to multiple living and dining spaces. Four incredible bedrooms each feature an en suite bathroom and either a private balcony or access to the patio, providing the ultimate views and unparalleled comfort.\u003cbr\u003eThe patio is the jewel of the home featuring a beautiful, unique pool and hot tub, expansive lounging space, a large fire pit, multiple sheltered areas, and a built-in grill. Enjoy a relaxing swim, sunbathe in comfort and privacy, or simply enjoy the amazing views.\u003cbr\u003eTake a few steps down to your own personal swimming platform! With kayaks and paddleboards, you can cruise the warm clear waters – or you can simply jump in. This is also the perfect vantage point for the gorgeous sunsets over the water.
